HeyZack Wiki

Comprehensive documentation for HeyZack AI-Powered Smart Home & Building Automation System

HeyZack Documentation

Welcome to the HeyZack documentation wiki. This resource consolidates all brand, product, audience, and marketing documentation for the AI-powered smart home and building automation system.

Quick Links

SectionDescription
Product OverviewBrand snapshot, positioning, and value propositions
FeaturesComplete feature breakdown with benefits
SpecificationsTechnical specs for all 128 products
Brand PositioningCBBE framework and strategic positioning
Voice & ToneUnified writing guidelines for B2B and B2C

About HeyZack

Brand Promise: “AI Automation for Residential & Commercial Buildings”

HeyZack offers a comprehensive ecosystem of 128 smart devices across 15 categories, serving both residential homes (B2C) and commercial buildings (B2B) with a 50/50 market split.

Key Differentiators

  • AI-Driven Automation — True learning that adapts to behaviors, not just schedules
  • DIY Installation — Complete setup in under 30 minutes, no tools required
  • Unified Control — One app for everything, voice-enabled
  • Energy Efficiency — 15-30% energy savings through intelligent management
  • Privacy-First — Local storage options, edge computing, bank-level encryption

Documentation Structure

Product

  • Overview — Brand snapshot, pillars, value propositions
  • Features — 16 core features with benefits
  • Specifications — All products, protocols, pricing

Brand

  • Positioning — CBBE framework, competitive positioning
  • Voice & Tone — B2B and B2C writing guidelines

Audience

  • Primary Persona — Tech-savvy homeowners (B2C)
  • Secondary Personas — Energy-conscious, safety-focused (B2C)
  • B2B Personas — Property managers, hospitality

Marketing

  • Ad Creative — Pre-launch ad copy library
  • Email Templates — Pre-launch and launch sequences
  • Campaign Copy — Landing pages, press release
  • Social Content — 30-day content calendar
  • Engagement Playbook — Hooks, review responses
  • Influencer Outreach — DM and email scripts
  • Community Management — Discord/Facebook playbook

Getting Started

New to HeyZack documentation? Start here:

  1. Understand the product → Product Overview
  2. Know your audience → Primary Persona or B2B Personas
  3. Match the voice → Voice & Tone Guide
  4. Create content → Browse Marketing templates

Generated from HeyZack campaign outputs using wiki-doc-generator skill.
